visual_description: A man in a dark jacket stands in a dimly lit shop, aiming a handgun forward with his right hand. The scene abruptly cuts to a fiery explosion, engulfing the frame in orange and yellow flames. A person in a light-colored shirt is briefly visible in the background before being obscured by the blaze.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and moderate loudness, speaking at a moderate pace. There are no noticeable non-speech sounds or cues.
